Content of README.md:

# Order Processing System

A simple order processing application with comprehensive type hints, docstrings, error handling, and unit tests.

## Project Structure

```
.
├── logs
│   └── app.log
├── README.md
├── requirements.txt
├── src
│   ├── exceptions.py
│   └── main.py
└── tests
    └── test_main.py
```

## Usage

To run the application, execute the following command:

```bash
python src/main.py
```

To run the unit tests, use this command:

```bash
python -m unittest

Content of requirements.txt:

# No external dependencies yet

Content of src/main.py:

"""Main application module"""

import logging
from typing import List, Dict, Any
from src.exceptions import InvalidItemError

# Configure logging
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s',
    handlers=[
        logging.FileHandler('logs/app.log'),
        logging.StreamHandler()
    ]
)

Item = Dict[str, Any]
Order = Dict[str, Any]

def calculate_total(items: List[Item]) -> float:
    """
    Calculate the total

Content of src/exceptions.py:


"""Custom exceptions for the order processing system."""

class InvalidItemError(Exception):
    """Raised when an item is invalid."""
    pass
